status: stopped on first invalid arm before Opus judging

failure.reason: The completed Haiku arm exceeded both the registered token and cost ceilings.

product_learning: The first complete cheap-model receipt shows ambient Claude Code context dominates the compact answer cost. The next development candidate replaces the default system prompt with a minimal identical isolation prompt in both arms.
post_failure_rule: Do not rerun the exposed case. Any successor must freeze the system-prompt optimization and use a fresh replacement case.
